13	// SnippetsFilter represents a ngfAPI.SnippetsFilter.
14	type SnippetsFilter struct {
15		// Source is the SnippetsFilter.
16		Source *ngfAPI.SnippetsFilter
17		// Snippets stored as a map of nginx context to snippet value.
18		Snippets map[ngfAPI.NginxContext]string
19		// Conditions define the conditions to be reported in the status of the SnippetsFilter.
20		Conditions []conditions.Condition
21		// Valid indicates whether the SnippetsFilter is semantically and syntactically valid.
22		Valid bool
23		// Referenced indicates whether the SnippetsFilter is referenced by a Route.
24		Referenced bool
25	}
26	
27	// getSnippetsFilterResolverForNamespace returns a resolveExtRefFilter function.
28	// This function resolves a LocalObjectReference to a SnippetsFilter in the given namespace.
29	// If the SnippetsFilter exists, it is marked as referenced and returned as an ExtensionRefFilter.
30	func getSnippetsFilterResolverForNamespace(
31		snippetsFilters map[types.NamespacedName]*SnippetsFilter,
32		ns string,
33	) resolveExtRefFilter {
34		return func(ref v1.LocalObjectReference) *ExtensionRefFilter {
35			if len(snippetsFilters) == 0 {
36				return nil
37			}
38	
39			if ref.Group != ngfAPI.GroupName || ref.Kind != kinds.SnippetsFilter {
40				return nil
41			}
42	
43			sf := snippetsFilters[types.NamespacedName{Namespace: ns, Name: string(ref.Name)}]
44			if sf == nil {
45				return nil
46			}
47	
48			sf.Referenced = true
49	
50			return &ExtensionRefFilter{SnippetsFilter: sf, Valid: sf.Valid}
51		}
52	}
53	
54	func processSnippetsFilters(
55		snippetsFilters map[types.NamespacedName]*ngfAPI.SnippetsFilter,
56	) map[types.NamespacedName]*SnippetsFilter {
57		if len(snippetsFilters) == 0 {
58			return nil
59		}
60	
61		processed := make(map[types.NamespacedName]*SnippetsFilter)
62	
63		for nsname, sf := range snippetsFilters {
64			if cond := validateSnippetsFilter(sf); cond != nil {
65				processed[nsname] = &SnippetsFilter{
66					Source:     sf,
67					Conditions: []conditions.Condition{*cond},
68					Valid:      false,
69				}
70	
71				continue
72			}
73	
74			processed[nsname] = &SnippetsFilter{
75				Source:   sf,
76				Valid:    true,
77				Snippets: createSnippetsMap(sf.Spec.Snippets),
78			}
79		}
80	
81		return processed
82	}
83	
84	func createSnippetsMap(snippets []ngfAPI.Snippet) map[ngfAPI.NginxContext]string {
85		snippetsMap := make(map[ngfAPI.NginxContext]string)
86	
87		// snippets are already validated, so we can assume there's max one snippet per context.
88		for _, snippet := range snippets {
89			snippetsMap[snippet.Context] = snippet.Value
90		}
91	
92		return snippetsMap
93	}
94	
95	func validateSnippetsFilter(filter *ngfAPI.SnippetsFilter) *conditions.Condition {
96		var allErrs field.ErrorList
97		snippetsPath := field.NewPath("spec.snippets")
98	
99		if len(filter.Spec.Snippets) == 0 {
100			cond := conditions.NewSnippetsFilterInvalid(
101				field.Required(snippetsPath, "at least one snippet must be provided").Error(),
102			)
103			return &cond
104		}
105	
106		usedContexts := make(map[ngfAPI.NginxContext]struct{})
107	
108		for i, snippet := range filter.Spec.Snippets {
109			valuePath := snippetsPath.Index(i).Child("value")
110			if snippet.Value == "" {
111				cond := conditions.NewSnippetsFilterInvalid(
112					field.Required(valuePath, "value cannot be empty").Error(),
113				)
114	
115				return &cond
116			}
117	
118			ctxPath := snippetsPath.Index(i).Child("context")
119	
120			switch snippet.Context {
121			case ngfAPI.NginxContextMain,
122				ngfAPI.NginxContextHTTP,
123				ngfAPI.NginxContextHTTPServer,
124				ngfAPI.NginxContextHTTPServerLocation:
125			default:
126				err := field.NotSupported(
127					ctxPath,
128					snippet.Context,
129					[]ngfAPI.NginxContext{
130						ngfAPI.NginxContextMain,
131						ngfAPI.NginxContextHTTP,
132						ngfAPI.NginxContextHTTPServer,
133						ngfAPI.NginxContextHTTPServerLocation,
134					},
135				)
136	
137				allErrs = append(allErrs, err)
138			}
139	
140			if _, ok := usedContexts[snippet.Context]; ok {
141				allErrs = append(
142					allErrs,
143					field.Invalid(ctxPath, snippet.Context, "only one snippet is allowed per context"),
144				)
145	
146				continue
147			}
148	
149			usedContexts[snippet.Context] = struct{}{}
150		}
151	
152		if allErrs != nil {
153			cond := conditions.NewSnippetsFilterInvalid(allErrs.ToAggregate().Error())
154			return &cond
155		}
156	
157		return nil
158	}
159

1	package graph
2	
3	import (
4		"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types"
5		"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/validation/field"
6		v1 "sigs.k8s.io/gateway-api/apis/v1"
7	
8		ngfAPI "github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/v2/apis/v1alpha1"
9		"github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/v2/internal/framework/kinds"
10	)
11	
12	// ExtensionRefFilter are NGF-specific extensions to the "filter" behavior.
13	type ExtensionRefFilter struct {
14		// SnippetsFilter contains the SnippetsFilter.
15		// Will be non-nil if the Ref.Kind is SnippetsFilter and the SnippetsFilter exists.
16		// Once we support more filters, we can extend this struct with more filter kinds.
17		SnippetsFilter *SnippetsFilter
18		// AuthenticationFilter contains the AuthenticationFilter.
19		// Will be non-nil if the Ref.Kind is AuthenticationFilter and the AuthenticationFilter exists.
20		AuthenticationFilter *AuthenticationFilter
21		// Valid indicates whether the filter is valid.
22		Valid bool
23	}
24	
25	// resolveExtRefFilter resolves a LocalObjectReference to an *ExtensionRefFilter.
26	// If it cannot be resolved, *ExtensionRefFilter will be nil.
27	type resolveExtRefFilter func(ref v1.LocalObjectReference) *ExtensionRefFilter
28	
29	func validateExtensionRefFilter(ref *v1.LocalObjectReference, path *field.Path) field.ErrorList {
30		var allErrs field.ErrorList
31	
32		extRefPath := path.Child("extensionRef")
33	
34		if ref == nil {
35			return field.ErrorList{field.Required(extRefPath, "cannot be nil")}
36		}
37	
38		if ref.Name == "" {
39			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Required(extRefPath, "name cannot be empty"))
40		}
41	
42		if ref.Group != ngfAPI.GroupName {
43			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.NotSupported(extRefPath, ref.Group, []string{ngfAPI.GroupName}))
44		}
45	
46		switch ref.Kind {
47		case kinds.SnippetsFilter:
48		case kinds.AuthenticationFilter:
49		default:
50			allErrs = append(allErrs,
51				field.NotSupported(
52					extRefPath,
53					ref.Kind,
54					[]string{kinds.SnippetsFilter, kinds.AuthenticationFilter}),
55			)
56		}
57	
58		return allErrs
59	}
60	
61	// buildExtRefFilterResolvers builds a map of resolvers for all supported extension filter kinds.
62	func buildExtRefFilterResolvers(
63		namespace string,
64		snippetsFilters map[types.NamespacedName]*SnippetsFilter,
65		authenticationFilters map[types.NamespacedName]*AuthenticationFilter,
66	) map[string]resolveExtRefFilter {
67		resolvers := make(map[string]resolveExtRefFilter, 2)
68	
69		resolvers[kinds.SnippetsFilter] = getSnippetsFilterResolverForNamespace(
70			snippetsFilters,
71			namespace,
72		)
73	
74		resolvers[kinds.AuthenticationFilter] = getAuthenticationFilterResolverForNamespace(
75			authenticationFilters,
76			namespace,
77		)
78	
79		return resolvers
80	}
81

apiVersion: gateway.nginx.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnippetsPolicy
metadata:
  name: limit-conn-sp
spec:
  targetRefs:
    - group: gateway.networking.k8s.io
      kind: Gateway
      name: gateway
  snippets:
    - context: http
      value: limit_conn_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=addr:10m;
    - context: http.server.location
      value: limit_conn addr 1;

1	package snippetspolicy
2	
3	import (
4		"fmt"
5	
6		"github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/v2/apis/v1alpha1"
7		"github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/v2/internal/controller/nginx/config/http"
8		"github.com/nginx/nginx-gateway-fabric/v2/internal/controller/nginx/config/policies"
9	)
10	
11	const (
12		mainTemplate = `
13	# SnippetsPolicy %s main context
14	%s
15	`
16		httpTemplate = `
17	# SnippetsPolicy %s http context
18	%s
19	`
20		serverTemplate = `
21	# SnippetsPolicy %s server context
22	%s
23	`
24		locationTemplate = `
25	# SnippetsPolicy %s location context
26	%s
27	`
28	)
29	
30	// Generator generates NGINX configuration snippets for SnippetsPolicies.
31	type Generator struct {
32		policies.UnimplementedGenerator
33	}
34	
35	// NewGenerator returns a new instance of Generator.
36	func NewGenerator() *Generator {
37		return &Generator{}
38	}
39	
40	// GenerateForMain generates policy configuration for the main block.
41	func (g *Generator) GenerateForMain(pols []policies.Policy) policies.GenerateResultFiles {
42		return g.generate(pols, v1alpha1.NginxContextMain)
43	}
44	
45	// GenerateForHTTP generates policy configuration for the http block.
46	func (g *Generator) GenerateForHTTP(pols []policies.Policy) policies.GenerateResultFiles {
47		return g.generate(pols, v1alpha1.NginxContextHTTP)
48	}
49	
50	// GenerateForServer generates policy configuration for the server block.
51	func (g *Generator) GenerateForServer(pols []policies.Policy, _ http.Server) policies.GenerateResultFiles {
52		return g.generate(pols, v1alpha1.NginxContextHTTPServer)
53	}
54	
55	// GenerateForLocation generates policy configuration for the location block.
56	func (g *Generator) GenerateForLocation(pols []policies.Policy, _ http.Location) policies.GenerateResultFiles {
57		return g.generate(pols, v1alpha1.NginxContextHTTPServerLocation)
58	}
59	
60	// GenerateForInternalLocation generates policy configuration for an internal location block.
61	func (g *Generator) GenerateForInternalLocation(pols []policies.Policy) policies.GenerateResultFiles {
62		return g.generate(pols, v1alpha1.NginxContextHTTPServerLocation)
63	}
64	
65	func (g *Generator) generate(
66		pols []policies.Policy,
67		context v1alpha1.NginxContext,
68	) policies.GenerateResultFiles {
69		var files policies.GenerateResultFiles
70	
71		for _, policy := range pols {
72			sp, ok := policy.(*v1alpha1.SnippetsPolicy)
73			if !ok {
74				continue
75			}
76	
77			for _, snippet := range sp.Spec.Snippets {
78				if snippet.Context != context {
79					continue
80				}
81	
82				policyNsName := fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s", sp.GetNamespace(), sp.GetName())
83				policyFileID := fmt.Sprintf("%s-%s", sp.GetNamespace(), sp.GetName())
84	
85				// Build content and filename
86				var content string
87				var filename string
88	
89				switch context {
90				case v1alpha1.NginxContextMain:
91					content = fmt.Sprintf(mainTemplate, policyNsName, snippet.Value)
92					filename = fmt.Sprintf("SnippetsPolicy_main_%s.conf", policyFileID)
93				case v1alpha1.NginxContextHTTP:
94					content = fmt.Sprintf(httpTemplate, policyNsName, snippet.Value)
95					filename = fmt.Sprintf("SnippetsPolicy_http_%s.conf", policyFileID)
96				case v1alpha1.NginxContextHTTPServer:
97					content = fmt.Sprintf(serverTemplate, policyNsName, snippet.Value)
98					filename = fmt.Sprintf("SnippetsPolicy_server_%s.conf", policyFileID)
99				case v1alpha1.NginxContextHTTPServerLocation:
100					content = fmt.Sprintf(locationTemplate, policyNsName, snippet.Value)
101					filename = fmt.Sprintf("SnippetsPolicy_location_%s.conf", policyFileID)
102				}
103	
104				files = append(files, policies.File{
105					Name:    filename,
106					Content: []byte(content),
107				})
108			}
109		}
110		return files
111	}
112

file.content:
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: cafe-routes
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: auth-gateway
  rules:
    - matches:
        # Coffee with Basic Auth via basic-auth1
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /coffee1
        # Additional coffee path with same auth
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /coffee2
      backendRefs:
        - name: coffee
          port: 80
      filters:
        - type: ExtensionRef
          extensionRef:
            group: gateway.nginx.org
            kind: AuthenticationFilter
            name: basic-auth1
    # Tea with Basic Auth via basic-auth2
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /tea
      backendRefs:
        - name: tea
          port: 80
      filters:
        - type: ExtensionRef
          extensionRef:
            group: gateway.nginx.org
            kind: AuthenticationFilter
            name: basic-auth2
    # Latte without authentication
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /latte
      backendRefs:
        - name: latte
          port: 80
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: GRPCRoute
metadata:
  name: grpc-route
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: auth-gateway
      sectionName: http
  rules:
    - matches:
        - method:
            service: helloworld.Greeter
            method: SayHello
      filters:
        - type: ExtensionRef
          extensionRef:
            group: gateway.nginx.org
            kind: AuthenticationFilter
            name: basic-auth-grpc
      backendRefs:
        - name: grpc-backend
          port: 8080
---
# Basic Auth Secret and AuthenticationFilter
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: basic-auth1
type: nginx.org/htpasswd
data:
  # Base64 of "htpasswd -bn user1 password1"
  auth: dXNlcjE6JGFwcjEkWEFKeU5yekgkY0Rjdy9YMVBCZTFmTjltQVBweXpxMA==
---
apiVersion: gateway.nginx.org/v1alpha1
kind: AuthenticationFilter
metadata:
  name: basic-auth1
spec:
  type: Basic
  basic:
    secretRef:
      name: basic-auth1
    realm: "Restricted basic-auth1"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: basic-auth2
type: nginx.org/htpasswd
data:
  # Base64 of "htpasswd -bn user2 password2"
  auth: dXNlcjI6JGFwcjEkd0lKUUpjZEUkSXUuYjVhMlBGODdtQi5zT0x4aUg5MQ==
---
apiVersion: gateway.nginx.org/v1alpha1
kind: AuthenticationFilter
metadata:
  name: basic-auth2
spec:
  type: Basic
  basic:
    secretRef:
      name: basic-auth2
    realm: "Restricted basic-auth2"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: basic-auth-grpc
type: nginx.org/htpasswd
data:
  # Base64 of "htpasswd -bn user2 password2"
  auth: dXNlcjI6JGFwcjEkd0lKUUpjZEUkSXUuYjVhMlBGODdtQi5zT0x4aUg5MQ==
---
apiVersion: gateway.nginx.org/v1alpha1
kind: AuthenticationFilter
metadata:
  name: basic-auth-grpc
spec:
  type: Basic
  basic:
    secretRef:
      name: basic-auth-grpc
    realm: "Restricted basic-auth-grpc"

apiVersion: gateway.nginx.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnippetsFilter
metadata:
  name: all-contexts
spec:
  snippets:
    - context: main
      value: worker_priority 0;
    - context: http
      value: aio off;
    - context: http.server
      value: auth_delay 0s;
    - context: http.server.location
      value: keepalive_time 1h;
---
apiVersion: gateway.nginx.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnippetsFilter
metadata:
  name: grpc-all-contexts
spec:
  snippets:
    - context: main
      value: worker_shutdown_timeout 120s;
    - context: http
      value: types_hash_bucket_size 64;
    - context: http.server
      value: send_lowat 1024;
    - context: http.server.location
      value: tcp_nodelay on;
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: coffee
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: gateway
      sectionName: http
  hostnames:
    - "cafe.example.com"
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /coffee
      filters:
        - type: ExtensionRef
          extensionRef:
            group: gateway.nginx.org
            kind: SnippetsFilter
            name: all-contexts
      backendRefs:
        - name: coffee
          port: 80
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: GRPCRoute
metadata:
  name: grpc-route
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: gateway
      sectionName: http
  rules:
    - matches:
        - method:
            service: helloworld.Greeter
            method: SayHello
      filters:
        - type: ExtensionRef
          extensionRef:
            group: gateway.nginx.org
            kind: SnippetsFilter
            name: grpc-all-contexts
      backendRefs:
        - name: grpc-backend
          port: 8080

Let me be careful about a few technical claims:

7. OIDC requires HTTPS listener (validateOIDCFilters). ✓
8. OIDC URI conflict detection across hostnames. ✓
9. The --snippets flag enables both SnippetsFilter and SnippetsPolicy; --snippets-filters is deprecated. ✓
10. SnippetsPolicy Conflicts returns false (merged by lexicographic order, caught by nginx -t). ✓
11. Snippet value is arbitrary NGINX text — safety net is feature flag (opt-in) + `nginx -t` config test (mentioned in validator Conflicts comment). ✓

One more thing to verify: is there a `nginx -t` validation step for snippets? The validator.go Conflicts comment says "Detailed logical conflicts (e.g. conflicting NGINX directives) are caught by nginx -t." This implies snippets content validity is checked by nginx test reload, not by NGF. This is the key security point — snippets are arbitrary text, so NGF doesn't validate directive semantics; it relies on the opt-in feature flag + nginx's own config test. Good.
